def negative_lock_acquire_and_release_owned_by_different_callers():
    rule_id = "lock_acquire_and_release_owned_by_different_callers"
    family = "boundaries"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flag APIs that require one caller to acquire a lock and another caller to release it."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
